sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29327" key="dusou/lwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσούλωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29327.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to scar over</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:4:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:196" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.196</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
